name: PT Star Pacific Tbk
summary: PT Star Pacific Tbk, through its subsidiaries, engages in the investment and media businesses in Indonesia. It publishes newspapers and magazines; and offers advertising agency, mass media, general trading, and radio broadcasting services. The company was formerly known as PT Lippo ENet Tbk and changed its name to PT Star Pacific Tbk in November 2008. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Star Pacific Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Inti Anugerah Pratama.
